nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Global operations expose Organon to additional risks
nodes.context: We have significant global operations, which expose us to additional risks, and any adverse event could adversely affect our results of operations and financial condition.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Tariffs, trade restrictions or domestic sourcing requirements
nodes.context: The imposition of tariffs on, or other trade restrictions or domestic sourcing requirements ... could have a material adverse effect on our business, financial condition, results of operations, cash flows, ability to pay dividends or repurchase shares, or stock price.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Adverse global or local economic developments
nodes.context: Adverse developments in the global economy or in one or more of our local markets could impact our ability to grow our business.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Changes in tax laws or other tax guidance
nodes.context: Changes in tax laws or other tax guidance could adversely affect our effective tax rates, financial condition or results of operations.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Material weaknesses in ICFR (risk factor)
nodes.context: We identified material weaknesses in our internal control over financial reporting, which could impact our ability to report our results of operations and financial condition accurately and in a timely manner.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Cyberattacks affecting IT systems
nodes.context: Cyberattacks affecting our IT systems could result in exposure of confidential information, the modification of critical data or the disruption of our worldwide operations, including manufacturing and sales operations.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Inability to execute deleveraging plan
nodes.context: We may not be able to successfully execute our plan to deleverage our business or otherwise reduce our debt level, which could adversely affect our operating flexibility, business, financial condition, results of operations, or cash flows.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Substantial indebtedness
nodes.context: Our substantial indebtedness could adversely affect our financial condition and results of operations.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Restrictive covenants under indebtedness
nodes.context: We are subject to a number of restrictive covenants under our indebtedness, including customary operating restrictions and financial covenants, which could restrict our ability to pay dividends or adversely affect our financing options and liquidity position.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Concentration in key products
nodes.context: Key products generate a significant amount of our profits and cash flows, and any events that adversely affect the markets for our leading products could adversely affect our results of operations and financial condition.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Healthcare reform initiatives and regulatory actions
nodes.context: Recent global healthcare reform initiatives and U.S., judicial decisions, laws, regulations, executive orders and political actions could adversely affect our future revenues and profitability.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Goodwill impairment risk
nodes.context: An impairment of our Goodwill could materially impact our financial condition and results of operations.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Limited scope of intellectual property licenses
nodes.context: Our growth could be limited by the scope of our intellectual property licenses.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Disruptions at FDA, SEC and comparable foreign agencies
nodes.context: Disruptions at the FDA, the SEC and other comparable foreign government agencies caused by funding shortages or other events could hinder their ability ... which could negatively impact our business.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Product quality issues
nodes.context: Issues with product quality could have an adverse effect on our business or cause a loss of customer confidence in us or our products
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Component or raw material supply difficulties
nodes.context: We may be unable to obtain sufficient components or raw materials on a timely basis or for a cost-effective price, or we may experience other supply difficulties
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Reliance on third-party relationships and outsourcing
nodes.context: Reliance on third-party relationships and outsourcing arrangements could materially adversely affect our business.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Third-party AI and ethical compliance risk
nodes.context: If we or our third-party suppliers, logistics providers, and manufacturers do not comply with ethical business practices or with related laws and regulations, including relating to AI use, our reputation, business, financial condition, results of operations or prospects could be harmed.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Biosimilar regulatory risks and uncertainties
nodes.context: Biosimilars carry unique regulatory risks and uncertainties, which could adversely affect our results of operations and financial condition.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: FDA radical transparency / CRL release
nodes.context: The FDA's shift toward radical transparency, including plans to release future complete response letters promptly after they are issued to sponsors and increase enforcement in advertising and promotion, could have an adverse impact on our business
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: China VBP and pricing pressure
nodes.context: China has made reduction of costs and provision of affordable pharmaceutical products to patients a key priority and has implemented reimbursement and procurement programs to achieve these goals, such as VBP and URPS.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: China and emerging markets investment risk
nodes.context: We may not realize benefits from our investments in China and emerging markets.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Privacy and data protection regulatory risk
nodes.context: We are subject to a significant number of privacy and data protection laws and regulations globally ... GDPR ... PIPL ... U.S. state privacy laws.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Common Stock price and trading volume volatility
nodes.context: The price and trading volume of our Common Stock may be volatile, and stockholders could lose all or part of their investment in our Company.
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: FY2025 10-K forward-looking statements (PSLRA safe harbor)
nodes.context: expectations for financial, business or strategic matters regarding or affecting us that are forward-looking statements within the meaning of the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995
nodes.community: Adverse Global Or Local Economic Developments / Alan Ezekowitz / Biosimilar Regulatory Risks And Uncertainties

nodes.name: Non-GAAP presentation dispute (Table 4 / Comment 1) - Reg G / C&DI 102.10

attributes.subject: Non-GAAP financial measures presentation; alleged inclusion of GAAP-style line items and subtotals plus a gross profit measure not in Form 10-Q
attributes.regulation: C&DIs for Non-GAAP Financial Measures Question 102.10(a) and (c)
attributes.staff_position: Remove this presentation from future filings or explain compliance with Question 102.10(a) and (c)
attributes.company_position: Will include gross profit in GAAP Consolidated Statements of Income in future 10-Qs and 10-Ks; will revise Table 4 to present each non-GAAP reconciliation separately

nodes.context: the updated presentation continues to include most of the line items and subtotals found in your GAAP income statement and adds a measure of gross profit not found in your Form 10-Q. As previously requested, please remove this presentation from future filings or alternatively explain to us in detail how this presentation complies with the guidance in Question 102.10(a) and (c)

nodes.name: Spin-related costs disclosure (Comment 5)

nodes.context: As previously discussed in our response dated May 14, 2024 to Comment 5, the Company will provide a further description and quantification of the spin-related and manufacturing network costs within the footnotes of our earnings releases.
